overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a narrow stone corridor indoors before exiting to an outdoor courtyard during golden hour. The environment features rustic stone architecture blended with sci-fi elements, transitioning from dim artificial interior lighting to warm natural sunset lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with storage furniture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit stone corridor toward a metal exit door at the end of the hallway

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone block walls lining the corridor
rectangular metal ventilation grate mounted on the wall
dark leather sofa with wooden frame against the right wall
tall wooden shelving units holding various containers and items
heavy metal door with industrial locking mechanism at corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed stone corridor with artificial lighting. The walls are lined with storage shelves, a leather sofa, and industrial fixtures, creating a lived-in, utilitarian atmosphere as the character approaches the metal exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stone courtyard with planters and scenic views

events.description: character exits the building through the metal door into an open-air stone courtyard
character stops walking and tilts camera upward to examine the building facade and sky

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and exploring the outdoor courtyard, pausing to look up at the stone architecture and surrounding environment

entered.detail: weathered stone archway marking the transition from indoor to outdoor space
tall metallic communications tower visible on the horizon beyond the courtyard
mature leafy tree growing from the center of the courtyard dirt
multi-story stone building with small rectangular windows and weathered texture
rectangular concrete planters containing small shrubs
stone beam or bridge structure spanning overhead between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stone corridor into a sunlit courtyard during golden hour, revealing weathered stone architecture, scattered trees, and distant structures. The camera pans upward to take in the building facade and overhead stone structures against a warm, cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, utilitarian interior into a vast, sun-drenched outdoor courtyard. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow stone corridor lined with storage shelves, a leather sofa, and industrial fixtures under artificial lighting. As the character approaches and passes through a metal exit door, the enclosed space suddenly opens into a wide courtyard bathed in the warm glow of golden hour. The scene then expands to reveal weathered stone architecture and scattered trees, before the camera pans upward to capture the building facades and overhead structures against a warm, cloudy sky.
